_comment: self-improve-stale-guard: at session start, warn if any self-improvement review items have gone unresolved past the age threshold (default 7 days). A queue nobody decides is its own failure mode; this makes the rot loud. Read-only and non-blocking: emits a systemMessage when something is overdue, {} otherwise. Tune the threshold via --max-age-days. Paste under the "SessionStart" key in ~/.claude/settings.json. Assumes the self-improve skill is installed at ~/.claude/skills/self-improve/ (repo mirror: skills/self-improve/).

hooks.command: bash -c 'SI="$HOME/.claude/skills/self-improve/self_improve.py"; ST="$HOME/.claude/skills/self-improve/_state"; if [ -f "$SI" ]; then python "$SI" --state-dir "$ST" guard --max-age-days 7 2>/dev/null || echo "{}"; else echo "{}"; fi'
